title: Superman
body:
# Superman

### Adds superman-like abilities to minecraft.

Example abilities:

* Laser
* Caper
* Superman Suit
* Flying
* X-Ray Beam

Watch the video for more detail:

<iframe width="1275" height="717" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/7cg0feGOEUc" title="Ich code MINECRAFT SUPERKRÄFTE in 1 Minute, 1 Stunde und 1 Tag" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
